mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nodes (user_id, name, os_type, status, agent_id, agent_secret_hash, agent_secret_issued_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{name}, #{osType}, 'Y', #{agentId}, #{agentSecretHash}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, name, os_type, status, last_seen, created_at, agent_id, agent_secret_hash, agent_secret_issued_at, update_status, update_current_sha, update_latest_sha, update_message, update_checked_at FROM nodes WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT n.id, n.user_id, n.name, n.os_type, n.status, n.last_seen, n.created_at, n.agent_id, n.agent_secret_hash, n.agent_secret_issued_at, n.update_status, n.update_current_sha, n.update_latest_sha, n.update_message, n.update_checked_at FROM nodes n WHERE n.user_id = #{userId} OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM team_nodes tn JOIN team_members tm ON tm.team_id = tn.team_id WHERE tn.node_id = n.id AND tm.user_id = #{userId} AND tm.status = 'ACTIVE' ) ORDER BY CASE WHEN n.user_id = #{userId} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, n.created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id, name, os_type, status, last_seen, created_at, agent_id, agent_secret_hash, agent_secret_issued_at, update_status, update_current_sha, update_latest_sha, update_message, update_checked_at FROM nodes WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT id, user_id, name, os_type, status, last_seen, created_at, agent_id, agent_secret_hash, agent_secret_issued_at, update_status, update_current_sha, update_latest_sha, update_message, update_checked_at FROM nodes WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND name = #{name}

SELECT id, user_id, name, os_type, status, last_seen, created_at, agent_id, agent_secret_hash, agent_secret_issued_at, update_status, update_current_sha, update_latest_sha, update_message, update_checked_at FROM nodes WHERE agent_id = #{agentId}
mapper.update: UPDATE nodes SET agent_secret_hash = #{agentSecretHash}, agent_secret_issued_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE nodes SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE nodes SET last_seen = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status <> 'D'
UPDATE nodes SET status = 'Y', last_seen = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND status <> 'D'

UPDATE nodes SET update_status = CASE WHEN update_status = 'UPDATING' THEN update_status ELSE 'PENDING' END, update_current_sha = #{currentSha}, update_latest_sha = #{latestSha}, update_message = NULL, update_checked_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE nodes SET update_status = 'UPDATING', update_message = '업데이트 명령 전송됨', update_checked_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE nodes SET update_status = 'NONE', update_current_sha = NULL, update_latest_sha = NULL, update_message = NULL, update_checked_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE nodes SET update_status = 'FAILED', update_message = #{message}, update_checked_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
